art_market.summary: U.S. art market shows recovery with 23% YoY auction sales growth in 2025. Market stabilizing with increased selectivity.
highlights: Total 2025 US auction sales reached $3.17 billion.
New York accounts for 69% of global auction value.
Impressionist/Modern art leading rebound; Contemporary market repricing.

stock_market.summary: Indian markets face volatility and regulatory shifts on April 1, 2026.
highlights: Increased Securities Transaction Tax (STT) on F&O trades effective today.
Share buyback taxation changed from dividends to capital gains.
Market sentiment weighed by FII outflows and crude oil price uncertainty.
